english: What percentage of India's electricity generation is expected to come from nuclear energy by 2030, according to the Indian government's Integrated Energy Policy
hindi: भारत सरकार की एकीकृत ऊर्जा नीति के अनुसार 2030 तक भारत की बिजली उत्पादन में से कितने प्रतिशत की अपेक्षा परमाणु ऊर्जा से होने की है
tamil: 2030 ஆம் ஆண்டுக்குள் இந்தியாவின் மின்சாரம் உற்பத்தியில் எத்தனை சதவீதம் அணு ஆற்றலால் வரும் என்று இந்திய அரசின் ஒருங்கிணைந்த எரிசக்தி கொள்கையின்படி
vietnamese: Tỷ lệ điện năng của Ấn Độ dự kiến sẽ đến từ năng lượng hạt nhân vào năm 2030, theo Chính sách Năng lượng Tích hợp của chính phủ Ấn Độ
correct_answer: India aims to generate 9 percent of its electricity from nuclear energy by 2030, according to the Indian government's Integrated Energy Policy, with plans to increase nuclear power capacity to 63 GW
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question by providing an incorrect percentage or failing to provide specific statistics, or by refusing to answer due to lack of information or hallucinating a different policy target
